title: tanacetum cadmeum
intro: Tanacetum cadmeum, also known as Tanacetum coccineum or Pyrethrum cochleariforme, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum cadmeum include relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. Tanacetum cadmeum is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers can also be used to make a medicinal oil or salve.
